terms.name: Federation
terms.definition: Governed network of independent institutions collaborating through explicit agreements

terms.name: Federation Charter
terms.definition: Living constitutional document defining mission, governance, and membership rules

terms.name: Federation Membership
terms.definition: Explicit institution participation with authority level and sharing permissions

terms.name: Federation Agreement
terms.definition: Versioned, signed agreement governing cross-institution collaboration

terms.name: Shared Mission
terms.definition: Joint mission with lead institution, supporting institutions, and decision authority

terms.name: Shared Objective
terms.definition: Federation-level goal mapped to institutional objectives

terms.name: Cross-Institution Team
terms.definition: Governed team with members from multiple institutions

terms.name: Shared Knowledge
terms.definition: Knowledge shared with explicit federation permissions

terms.name: Resource Exchange
terms.definition: Policy-driven sharing of equipment, facilities, and expertise

terms.name: Federation Mutual Aid
terms.definition: Auditable cross-institution assistance requests

terms.name: Federation Governance
terms.definition: Representative, consensus, or weighted voting governance models

terms.name: Federation Voting
terms.definition: Auditable voting framework with institutional memory

terms.name: Cross-Institution Identity
terms.definition: One verified Human identity across multiple governed institutional roles

terms.name: Federation Directory
terms.definition: Policy-controlled directory of institutions, capabilities, and contacts

terms.name: Capability Registry
terms.definition: Institution-advertised competencies, resources, and expertise

terms.name: Federation Analytics
terms.definition: Participation and impact metrics respecting institutional boundaries

terms.name: Federation Security
terms.definition: Verified institutions, signed agreements, and permission mapping

terms.name: AI Federation Advisor
terms.definition: Advisory coordination support without negotiating agreements

terms.name: Network Operating System
terms.definition: Platform evolution from single institution to multi-institution coordination

terms.name: Institutional Sovereignty
terms.definition: Every institution retains identity, governance, and data ownership
